product.name: JOLLY CHEF Clamshell Take Out Food Containers, [6 * 6" 200-Pack] To Go Containers Disposable, Sugarcane To Go Boxes for Salad,Lunch
features: Eco-Friendly:Take out food containers made of sugarcane, a sustainable, renewable and eco-friendly material that is an ideal alternative to traditional paper food containers.Disposable to go containers so sturdy that don’t have cleanup after use
Double-Lock and Convenient:To go box is designed with a double-locking clasp, which effectively prevents leakage and keeps food fresh, making it more convenient for takeaout or delivery

Large Pack:200 pack clamshell food container is perfect for burgers, sandwiches, salads, desserts.6*6 in size hold full meals, entrees side dishes. they are oil and cut resistant, microwave and refrigerator storage safe, perfect for home food storage
All Occasion:Disposable take out food containers perfect for camping, picnics, catering, BBQs,weddings,events,office lunches,eco friendly restaurants,take-out orders,potluck parties,and food trucks

After-sale Service:We value our customers and your shopping experience is very important to us. If for any reason our to go containers don't meet your standards, please freely to contact us, and we will give you a satisfactory response within 24 hours
